highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 adds FreeType-based font rendering support for Windows Nano Server.

bullets.lead: FreeType font support on Windows Nano Server
bullets.detail: SkiaSharp now uses FreeType as the font backend on Windows Nano Server, enabling font rendering in minimal container environments where GDI-based fonts are unavailable.

contributor_summaries.jeffska: Added FreeType-based font support for Windows Nano Server, fixing text rendering in minimal container environments
